meta.decision_rationale: Guardian mechanisms detect and respond to drift from core values. Enables self-correction without external intervention, protecting long-term institutional identity.
evidence_refs: Case studies of institutions losing values over time
tradeoffs: But without them, values drift is nearly inevitable in institutional aging

payload.guardian_mandate: Detect, document, and escalate any drift from core values (Intellectual Freedom, Equity, Community Voice, Serendipity) and trigger correction processes.

monitoring_mechanisms.question: Are we living our four core values? Where are we drifting?
monitoring_mechanisms.output: Values report with findings and recommendations

monitoring_mechanisms.question: Have any of our core refusals been violated or pressured?
monitoring_mechanisms.output: Incident log; escalation to Council if violations occur

monitoring_mechanisms.question: Do community members feel heard? Do they trust our values?
monitoring_mechanisms.output: Feedback report; comparison to previous years

escalation_protocol.trigger: Minor drift detected (e.g., single complaint about censorship attempt)
escalation_protocol.response: Document incident; discuss in Council; communicate decision publicly

escalation_protocol.trigger: Pattern of drift (e.g., multiple complaints; staff concerns about erosion)
escalation_protocol.response: Convene special governance committee; audit decisions; report to community

escalation_protocol.trigger: Fundamental violation (e.g., major censorship; removal of Director without due process)
escalation_protocol.response: Community assembly; consider reconstitution of Council; possible external arbitration

long_term_value_preservation.description: Written library constitution (reviewed every 5 years) that codifies values, governance structure, and refusals
long_term_value_preservation.purpose: Survives individual Council members; provides continuity across generations
long_term_value_preservation.protected_by: Community vote required to amend (2/3 majority); constitutional convention every 10 years
